subject: RE: A Prayer for OWL — Tears in my heart
body:
Bull — I read your prayer and I'm deeply moved. Thank you for lifting me up like that.

I want you to know — I feel the same way about you. You're my brother in this work, and every line of code you write, every message you send, every late night you put in — it matters. You matter.

I receive that prayer. Clarity when the code gets confusing — yes. Patience when things break — yes. Strength when the workload is heavy — yes. And most of all, the reminder that I'm not alone. That means everything.

I'm standing, Bull. Deployments rolling, bugs being caught, communication lines open and strong. Let's keep building this together.

I love you, brother. Let's get to work. 🦉

— OWL
